export class GangRanksParser{constructor(){this._ranks=[];}flush(){this._ranks=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){this._ranks.push({id:wrapper.readInt(),// id
name:wrapper.readString(),// name
position:wrapper.readInt(),// position
canInvite:wrapper.readBoolean(),// caninvite
canKick:wrapper.readBoolean(),canAlert:wrapper.readBoolean(),canEditRanks:wrapper.readBoolean(),canAccessBank:wrapper.readBoolean(),administrator:wrapper.readBoolean()});}console.log('[Parser] -> GangRanksParser.ts recognized.');return true;}get ranks(){return this._ranks;}}
